creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sven from comment #2)

Thanks, I just pushed an update to net-im/dendrite[0], and while it's not directly touching the rc.d script, I'm wondering if you could try it, and see if that resolves your problem ?

In the meantime, I'll see if I can reproduce it.

References:
[0] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=67990463e45e

Thanks!
